# KiloNode M1 blocked features v1
blocked live-connect
blocked real-connected-mode-response-tx
blocked prepared-to-real-tx-runtime-bridge
blocked auto-dispatch
blocked rf-bbs-access
blocked netrom-routing
blocked bbs-forwarding
blocked fbb-forwarding
blocked linbpq-command-compatibility
blocked fx25-fec
blocked ptt-control
blocked channel-busy-policy
